question_text: Where is customer data stored? Is data residency configurable?
answer_text: Customer data is stored in the AWS region elected at tenant creation. Supported regions: us-east-1, us-west-2, eu-west-1, eu-central-1, ap-southeast-2. Data does not leave the elected region for operational purposes. Cross-region replication is available as an opt-in feature for disaster recovery. [dr_bcp_overview]
